instruction: - Write out the code. - For each file changed provide detailed description of logic changed.
important_constraints: - Never change or add any commented lines within code blocks. Keep all original ones as is. - Do not write out files that didn't require change since last message. - For files that require no change but require filesystem move or rename provide bash commands.
output_formatting:
explanation of changes made in the file
File: `path/to/filename.ext` ``` {full file content here} ```
